fields.site_description: A gamified quiz platform that makes learning programming fun, engaging, and rewarding.

fields.title: React.js
fields.description:
React JS is a JavaScript library used to build user interfaces for websites and web apps.
It helps create dynamic and interactive pages by dividing the interface into reusable components.

This book explains the basics of React, including components, props, state, and simple event handling. It is designed for beginners and can also be used as a quick reference for developers.

This PDF is shared from GoalKicker and is based on Stack Overflow Documentation. It is available under the Creative Commons BY-SA license.

fields.title: CSS
fields.description:
CSS (Cascading Style Sheets) is used to style and design web pages.
It controls how HTML elements look, including colors, fonts, spacing, layout, and responsiveness.

This book explains the basics of CSS, such as selectors, properties, layouts, and common styling techniques. It helps beginners understand how to make websites look clean and modern, and it can also be used as a quick reference.

This PDF is shared from GoalKicker and is based on Stack Overflow Documentation. It is available under the Creative Commons BY-SA license.

fields.title: Bash
fields.description:
Bash is a command-line language used to interact with the operating system.
It allows users to run commands, manage files, and automate tasks using scripts.

This book explains the basics of Bash, including commands, variables, conditions, loops, and simple shell scripts. It is useful for beginners who want to work with the terminal and for users who need a quick reference.

This PDF is shared from GoalKicker and is based on Stack Overflow Documentation. It is available under the Creative Commons BY-SA license.

fields.title: SQL
fields.description:
SQL (Structured Query Language) is used to manage and work with databases.
It helps to store, update, and retrieve data quickly and efficiently.

This book covers the basic concepts of SQL, including creating tables, inserting and updating data, writing queries, and using functions. It is suitable for beginners and also works as a quick reference for developers.

This PDF is shared from GoalKicker and is based on Stack Overflow Documentation. It is available under the Creative Commons BY-SA license.

fields.title: HTML
fields.description:
HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the standard language used to create web pages.
It defines the structure of a website, such as headings, paragraphs, links, images, and forms.

This book is a simple and practical guide to HTML. It covers basic tags, page structure, and common elements used in modern websites. It is suitable for beginners and for developers who want a quick reference.

This PDF is provided by GoalKicker and is based on Stack Overflow Documentation. It is shared under the Creative Commons BY-SA license.

fields.title: Javascript
fields.description:
JavaScript is a programming language used to make websites interactive.
It allows web pages to respond to user actions, update content without reloading, and control dynamic elements like forms, buttons, and animations.

This book covers the core concepts of JavaScript, including variables, functions, conditions, loops, and basic browser interaction. It is suitable for beginners and also useful as a quick reference.

This PDF is shared from GoalKicker and is based on Stack Overflow Documentation. It is available under the Creative Commons BY-SA license.

fields.title: Python
fields.description:
Python is a popular programming language that is easy to read and learn.
It is used for web development, data analysis, automation, and many other applications.

This book explains the basic concepts of Python, such as variables, data types, loops, functions, and simple projects. It is ideal for beginners and can also be used as a quick reference guide.

This PDF is shared from GoalKicker and is based on Stack Overflow Documentation. It is available under the Creative Commons BY-SA license.
